text:
Perfect! I've fixed both issues:

## ✅ Fixes Applied

**1. Token Logos Fixed**
- Removed `fromTokenLogo = originChain.iconUrl` 
- Removed `toTokenLogo = destChain.iconUrl`
- Now native tokens (ETH) won't show chain logos
- Only shows token logo if the token has one (from metadata)
- Chain icons still show separately next to the chain name

**2. View Links Fixed**
- Added `getBlockExplorerUrl()` helper function
- Maps each chain to its block explorer:
  - Ethereum → etherscan.io
  - Base → basescan.org
  - Optimism → optimistic.etherscan.io
  - Arbitrum → arbiscan.io
  - Polygon → polygonscan.com
  - And 13 more chains
- Clicking "View" now opens the transaction in the proper block explorer

**Result:**
- ETH tokens won't show Base/Optimism logos anymore
- "View" button opens Basescan/Optimiscan instead of relay.link
- Chain icons still show next to chain names for context

Try refreshing the history now!
